name: 最后四人-The last four
short_description: The waking girl lost her memory? There's a zombie in an empty base? What is the cat guarding? Sleeping girl , is she eager to wake up? What's the wandering boy doing? Can we find out what happened on this base, get our happiness back? A little AVG game. I hope you like it.
detailed_description:
Once happy life is so good, "woke up" after the girl found she in the empty base.
Zombies? The cat ~ the zombie in the base!
Get out of here and head for Happiness!
Whether the girl can achieve his wish, What's going on at the base?
Solve the puzzle, head to the happiness of memory!

About Actor



AiLiSi
Her silvery hair shone in the sun like a fairy in the flowers.
It was a happy family of three, and she was a happy daughter.

She
She had attempted suicide, met the only he.
That was the moment when time really began to flow.
Happy lovers, as if to make the suffering has a meaning.

Mr.Meow
Cute cat, is a healing spirit.
It doesn't connect with his language, but there's no question of their intimate connection.

Mourner
-- a genius scientist.
Simple nickname, is the most true portrayal of him.
The great cause of advancing human society is not yet complete, but the present continuous state is the source of his happiness.

About games

It's a AVG game, investigating and finding items.
The big mystery is what happened on the base?
Before you can figure out the puzzle, you face starvation and death threats, and must find food quickly.
And when you find food...

Game duration
About 1 hour.

Operation method
Arrow key movement
Spaces confirm
B/Click the avatar icon open the backpack
M/Click the backpack icon open the menu
F4 Full-screen switchover
